description: VoiceAI Animation Design Tokens - Pixar-Inspired, Magical & Human

pixarPrinciples._documentation: The 12 Principles of Animation adapted for UI - making our personas feel alive

squashAndStretch.description: Objects deform based on speed and mass - gives weight and flexibility
squashAndStretch.usage: Apply to thinking dots, buttons on press, avatar reactions

anticipation.description: Preparation before action - wind up before the pitch
anticipation.usage: Before jumps, before speaking, before transitions
anticipation.cssExample: Start with slight opposite movement or scale-down

staging.description: Direct attention to what matters - clear visual hierarchy
staging.usage: Focus user attention on active persona, dim inactive elements
staging.principle: One clear idea at a time

straightAheadAndPose.description: Key poses define the motion - in-betweens create flow
straightAheadAndPose.usage: Define key states (idle, thinking, speaking, celebrating)

followThroughAndOverlap.description: Not everything stops at once - hair, clothes continue moving
followThroughAndOverlap.usage: Secondary elements follow primary with slight delay

slowInSlowOut.usage: Most transitions should ease in and out

arcs.description: Natural motion follows curved paths, not straight lines
arcs.usage: Floating elements, avatar movements, thought bubbles
arcs.cssExample: Use translateX AND translateY together, or rotate

secondaryAction.description: Supporting actions add richness - breathing, subtle glow
secondaryAction.usage: While speaking: avatar breathes, glow pulses, dots bounce
secondaryAction.principle: Never distract from the main action

timing.description: Speed conveys weight and emotion - heavy = slow, light = quick

exaggeration.description: Push poses further than reality for clarity and appeal
exaggeration.balance: Subtle for zen aesthetic, more for playful personas

solidDrawing.description: Weight, depth, balance - even 2D should feel 3D
solidDrawing.usage: Shadows, depth layers, consistent light source

appeal.description: Characters should be likeable and interesting to watch
appeal.usage: Smooth curves, warm colors, gentle movements
appeal.principle: Would you want to spend time with this character?

personaIdMapping._documentation: Maps legacy frontend IDs to canonical design system IDs

personaAnimationProfiles._documentation: Each persona has a distinct animation personality

ferni.description: Warm, playful, curious - like WALL-E discovering something new

peter-john.description: Energetic, practical, quick - like Linguini's nervous energy

alex-chen.description: Thoughtful, articulate, empathetic - like Joy explaining emotions

maya-santos.description: Organized, practical, steady - like EVE when focused

jordan-taylor.description: Creative, enthusiastic, expressive - like Dory's joyful energy

personaWaveformProfiles._documentation: Waveform animation settings per persona - energy, smoothing, speed

personaParticleProfiles._documentation: Particle animation behavior per persona - for ambient effects

avatarBreathe._comment: Pixar-inspired breathing for circular persona avatars. Subtle enough to feel alive but not distracting.

avatarFloat._comment: Gentle floating motion for discover cards and hero sections

avatarGlowRing._comment: Pulsing glow ring behind avatar for emphasis on hover/active states

pixarBounce._description: Full squash & stretch bounce with anticipation and follow-through

pixarThinkingTilt._description: Curious head tilt - like WALL-E examining something

pixarJoyBounce._description: Excited bounce - like Luxo Jr. hopping

pixarSadSlump._description: Weight of sadness - like Bing Bong fading

pixarAttention._description: Snap to attention - like EVE spotting a plant

pixarBreathe._description: Living, organic breathing - everything alive breathes

pixarFloat._description: Gentle floating - like balloons in Up

avatarNod._description: Agreement nod with squash & stretch - like WALL-E acknowledging

avatarShake._description: Gentle disagreement shake with squash on direction changes

avatarBounce._description: Luxo Jr. style excited bounce with full squash & stretch

avatarCuriousTilt._description: WALL-E curious head tilt - examining something interesting

avatarAttentiveLean._description: Focused attention - like WALL-E leaning in to listen

goldenRatioTiming._documentation: Timing based on golden ratio (φ = 1.618) and Fibonacci sequence for natural rhythm

avatarSquashStretch._documentation: Squash & stretch parameters for avatar states - scaleX and scaleY change inversely

speakingSystem._documentation: Three-Layer Speaking Animation System - Body, Halo, and Lid work in harmony to convey speech without a mouth
speakingSystem._philosophy: Body is PRIMARY (most visible, like a speaker cone), Halo is AMBIENT (peripheral awareness), Lid is DETAIL (articulation)

body._role: Primary speaking indicator - bass speaker effect

volumeMapping._description: How voice volume (0-1) maps to animation intensity

anticipation._documentation: Pixar's 'wind-up before the pitch' - preparatory motion that signals intent and builds expectation. Like an athlete crouching before a jump.

hover._description: Subtle wind-up on hover, signals the element is 'alive' and ready to respond

press._description: Squash on press - the moment of impact

focus._description: Focus ring with anticipation - gentle pulse signals attention received

organicTextures._documentation: Wabi-sabi (侘寂) - finding beauty in imperfection. Subtle noise and organic patterns that feel natural, not digital.

noise._description: Subtle grain texture for surfaces - breaks digital perfection
noise.subtle: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

paperTexture._description: Handmade paper feel - subtle fiber-like texture

breathingGradient._description: Organic gradient that shifts slowly - like light through clouds

imperfectBorder._description: Slightly irregular border radius - breaks artificial perfection

inkBleed._description: Soft edge effect like ink on paper

voiceEmotionGlow._documentation: Avatar glow colors and animations that reflect the agent's speaking tone. Makes the avatar feel alive and emotionally present during conversation.

neutral._description: Default conversational state - calm, attentive presence

calm._description: Peaceful, reassuring presence - like still water

thoughtful._description: Deep thinking, contemplative - like ocean teal

empathetic._description: Understanding, caring warmth - like a warm embrace

anxious._description: Sensing user stress - supportive, gentle pulse

encouraging._description: Motivating, uplifting energy - growth and possibility

voiceGlowPulse._description: Rhythmic pulse that syncs with speaking cadence

breathSync._documentation: BETTER THAN APPLE/GOOGLE: Breath-synchronized animations that feel alive, not mechanical
breathSync._philosophy: Traditional UI animations are robotic. Ferni breathes with you.

keyframeTemplate._note: Use CSS calc() with these percentages for smooth breath animation

circadian._documentation: BETTER THAN APPLE/GOOGLE: Time-aware design that adapts to human rhythms
circadian._philosophy: Dark mode is not enough. Ferni knows the difference between 10am focus and 2am presence.

warmthFilter._note: CSS filter to apply warmth: sepia() + hue-rotate() + saturate()

emotionalTheming._documentation: BETTER THAN APPLE: Not just light/dark mode - themes that respond to emotional context
emotionalTheming._philosophy: Apple's HIG gives you static elegance. Ferni's UI breathes with your emotional state.

zen.name: Zen Garden
zen.description: Default calm - warm paper and sage

midnight.name: Cedar Night
midnight.description: Dark mode with warm cedar tones

embrace.name: Warm Embrace
embrace.description: Extra warmth when you need comfort

energize.name: Morning Energy
energize.description: Vibrant and alive for high-energy moments

reflect.name: Quiet Reflection
reflect.description: Muted and gentle for processing moments

temperatureFilter._note: Color temperature filter: cool = blue shift, warm = orange shift

personaAura._documentation: BETTER THAN GOOGLE: Each persona creates an atmospheric presence, not just a theme color
personaAura._philosophy: Material Design gives you color schemes. Ferni personas have auras - ambient presence that affects the whole UI.

relationshipDepth._documentation: BETTER THAN APPLE/GOOGLE: UI that grows with your relationship
relationshipDepth._philosophy: Every session is not the same. Your 100th conversation should feel different than your first.

gettingToKnow.visualDescription: Starting to show personality, unlocking features

deepPartnership.visualDescription: UI feels like it knows you - subtle, personal, present

organicConversationFlow._documentation: BETTER THAN APPLE/GOOGLE: Replace rigid chat bubbles with organic, flowing conversation
organicConversationFlow._philosophy: Chat interfaces feel mechanical - boxes floating in space. Human conversation is a continuous river of dialogue, thoughts flowing into each other, not disconnected rectangles.
organicConversationFlow._inspiration: Pixar's fluidity - water in Finding Nemo, the organic blob shapes in Inside Out emotions

messageShapes._description: Organic shapes instead of hard rectangles

flowingBorders._description: Borders that breathe and flow, not static lines

connectionLines._description: Visual threads that connect messages in a conversation
connectionLines._philosophy: Messages don't float alone - they're part of a continuous dialogue

breathingContainers._description: Message containers that subtly breathe, suggesting life
breathingContainers._philosophy: Static boxes feel dead. A slight breathing motion makes the interface feel alive without being distracting.

presenceIndicators._description: Subtle animations showing the AI is present and listening
presenceIndicators._philosophy: Even when silent, presence matters. These micro-animations show 'I'm here with you'

transitionStyles._description: How messages enter and exit the conversation flow

microInteractions._documentation: BETTER THAN APPLE/GOOGLE: Advanced micro-interactions library
microInteractions._philosophy: Micro-interactions are the soul of great UI. Every tap, hover, and state change is an opportunity to delight. Apple pioneered this with iOS's rubber-banding. We take it further with emotional awareness.
microInteractions._inspiration: Apple's attention to touch feedback, Pixar's anticipation/follow-through, Material Design's ripples - but warmer, more human

touchFeedback._description: Haptic-style visual feedback for touch interactions

attentionGrabbers._description: Subtle animations to draw user attention

loadingVariants._description: Different loading states for different contexts

hoverEffects._description: Rich hover states beyond simple color changes

spotlight.background: radial-gradient(circle at var(--mouse-x) var(--mouse-y), var(--color-accent-subtle) 0%, transparent 50%)
